question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?
decomposed_queries: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?

retrieval_top.candidate_question: From ipilimumab melanoma trials, which have an overall follow-up duration greater than 21 months, list the Name of ICI and overall follow-up duration?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: What are the Name of ICI and overall follow-up duration for trials where Cancer type is Melanoma and Name of ICI is Ipilimumab?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';
